meaning: n.相当或相同事物,同族体
examples: A study on the oxygen consumption rate of chlorobenzene homologue under the condition of cosubstrate was conducted.
Its potential homologue MIM-B is also thought to code a putative tumor metastasis suppressor protein.
Effect of the coexistence of chlorobenzene homologue on the biodegradation of chlorobenzene for chlorobenzene acclimated sludge.
